title: RAG Post Processor
description: Clean and chunk text for RAG/LLM ingestion

datasetId.title: Dataset ID (for chaining)
datasetId.description: Apify dataset ID from a previous actor run. Use this to chain directly after any scraper.

data.title: Input Items
data.description: Array of objects from a previous scraper. Each needs a text, content, markdown, or html field.

chunk_size.title: Chunk Size (characters)
chunk_size.description: Maximum number of characters per chunk. Default is 1000.

overlap.title: Overlap between chunks
overlap.description: Number of characters to overlap between consecutive chunks. Default is 100.
